channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-447] add lctl --net XXX push
item.description: In order to clear out peer/conn data in the gnilnd for testing after adding lnet_notify(see LU-446), we need an alternative to lctl --net gni del_peer - as this nukes the peer and results in false lnd_query failures.

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,2645
back port to b2_1

Integrated in lustre-dev » x86_64,client,el6,inkernel #340
LU-447 lnet: add lctl --net XXX push (Revision 90913da176b3529758bc6fa52701373d92389440)

Result = SUCCESS
Oleg Drokin : 90913da176b3529758bc6fa52701373d92389440

Files :

  • lustre/utils/lctl.c
Wally can you push the patch again.
Will this patch make it into the Lustre 2.2 release?

Maloo failed with sanity test_220. Known test failure?

Yes, it's LU-614, which was fixed by commit becbc72 on master branch.
Maloo failed with sanity test_220. Known test failure?
thanks Wally!

The rebased one is patchset 3.

And the b1_8 version is in:

http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,1311

Wally

The original patch failed autotest at a time when there were a few unrelated failures. Could you please rebase on the latest code and resubmit the patch? Also, could you please submit a b1_8 version?

Thanks

Thanks

Peter

Also see Oracle BUG 24032.

Change is in:

http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,1003
